expectations.text: Suggests running Trivy via ACR task as the primary approach
expectations.evidence: Section 'Recommended: Trivy via ACR Task (Option A)' is the primary approach

expectations.text: Shows importing trivy image into ACR first to avoid Docker Hub dependency
Provides the az acr run command to execute Trivy scan
expectations.evidence: Shows both table and JSON variants of 'az acr run --registry cafehyna --cmd ...'

expectations.text: Filters for HIGH and CRITICAL severity vulnerabilities
Explains how to interpret or categorize the CVE findings
expectations.evidence: Provides categorization table (Fixable by us, Fixable upstream, OS-level, will_not_fix) and Python extraction script
